title: Revise World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control popup layouts

requirements.text: Revise the World Travel popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., section groupings, spacing, dividers), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

quotes: Could you revise the pop up box's of the upper left three buttons, world travel, time zone and global control, such that the layout is better outlined
a layout tailored to its own content
I would like the size to be little bit smaller than its size right now

acceptanceCriteria: World Travel popup is visibly smaller than its previous size
Content is organized with clear sections, consistent spacing, and visual dividers appropriate to World Travel content
No content is clipped or overflows the popup container

requirements.text: Revise the Time Zone popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., timezone list formatting, offset display, section groupings), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

quotes: Could you revise the pop up box's of the upper left three buttons, world travel, time zone and global control, such that the layout is better outlined
a layout tailored to its own content
I would like the size to be little bit smaller than its size right now

acceptanceCriteria: Time Zone popup is visibly smaller than its previous size
Timezone content is presented in a well-structured, readable layout appropriate to time zone data
No content is clipped or overflows the popup container

requirements.text: Revise the Global Control popup to have a layout tailored to its own content: improve internal structure with clear visual organization (e.g., control groupings, labeled sections, consistent spacing), and reduce the overall popup size to be slightly smaller than its current dimensions.

quotes: Could you revise the pop up box's of the upper left three buttons, world travel, time zone and global control, such that the layout is better outlined
a layout tailored to its own content
I would like the size to be little bit smaller than its size right now

acceptanceCriteria: Global Control popup is visibly smaller than its previous size
Controls and settings are organized in a structured, clearly grouped layout appropriate to global control options
No content is clipped or overflows the popup container

constraints: Do not change backend logic or data models
Each popup must have its own distinct layout — do not apply a single shared template across all three
Popup functionality must remain fully intact after layout revisions
nonGoals: Changing the content or features inside any of the three popups
Modifying any other popups or UI panels not mentioned
Redesigning the overall app layout or globe component
